titleStmt.title: SII 27.89: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 89. (A.R. No. 471 of 1928-29.) KUḶĀI, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the prākāra of Durgā-Peramēśvari temple.

This registers a gift of land and money for feeding brahmins in the temple of Durgā at Chitrapura when Kēsappa was governing Maṅgalūru-rajya at the instance of mahāpradhāna Bayichaya-daṇṇāyaka. The gift was made over to Varadēndratīrtha-śrīpāda.
It is dated 1336, Jaya, Kārttika śu. 1, Sunday corresponding to 1414 A.D., October 14, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1336 neya vartta
māna jaya saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 1 Ā śrī manmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra pratāpa dēvarā
ya mahārāyara rājyābhyudayadali śrīmanmahā pra
dhānaṁ bayicaya daṁṇāyakara nirūpadiṁ kēsappa
gaḷu maṁgaḷūra rājyavanāḷuvali citrapurada
durgā dēvateya stānadali gaṁge rāmēśvara
dē yāḍuva brāhmara bhōjanake pratidina biṁ
dakaṁ jana 12 kaṁ parivārada kayiṁda māḍisida
dharṁmada vivara ceṁdapa seṭi hara hari
ya taḷada Oḷagaṇa hosa beṭṭinalu naḍadu baha
bhata mū 300 kaṁ kāṭiga 750 ṟa ṭhāvinamara gēṇi
yiṁda gēṇi Ubhayaṁ gēṇi bedekāru nāḍa Oḷa
gaṇa beḷeyaṁ kiḍuvāḷa baḷiyiṁda bhattamū
250 kaṁga 25 Ubhayaṁ
nū parivārada jīvitakke prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ prati ja
na 1 kaṁ huṇi bēḷeya lekadalū kaṁdācārakke ba
rasikoṁḍu Ā ṭhāugaḷanū dhārāpūrvvakavāgi ko
ṭṭu Ā caṁdrārkastāyiyāgi naḍava mariyā
deyalu māḍida dharma yidharmavanū durggā
dēvateya samaṁjasa śrīvaradēṁdra tīrtha śrīpā
daṁgaḷa kayyalu koṭṭarāgi taḷada
hosa beṭṭinalu muṁnaṭṭuyidda gē
ṇina sīmeya naḍisu dharṁmavanu naḍasi
ru yikallu sōmēśvara śrīpādamūligaḷa
samaṁjasa naḍavudeṁdu baradakallu yi dha
ṁrmmake Ārobbaru tappidaru gaṁgeya
taṭiyali sāvira brāhmarū sāvira kavile

yanu koṁdapāpadali hōharu
yi dharṁmmavanu pālisi baharu
dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānātrēyōnu pālanaṁ
dānāssvargga mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ
Digital edition of SII 27.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
